changelog: Dev and Official are now SEPARATE app installs that can coexist on the same device. Dev installs as 'HushTV Dev' (com.hushtv.tv.dev), official installs as 'HushTV Official' (com.hushtv.tv). Side-by-side icons, side-by-side data, no more replacing one with the other.

ONE-TIME INSTALL NOTE — When upgrading from a previous Dev install, Android will show this as a NEW app install (not an update) because the package id changed. Your old 'HushTV' icon will stick around as an orphan; uninstall it once the new 'HushTV Dev' is on your launcher and you've re-added your playlist. Official-channel users are unaffected (their package id didn't change).
Mandatory:true so devices auto-prompt to install the new dev APK.
